title: Comment from Joint Public Health Informatics Taskforce (JPHIT), HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: The Joint Public Health Informatics Taskforce (JPHIT) appreciates the opportunity to comment on the HTI-5 Draft Rule. JPHIT represents a coalition of public health associations committed to advancing health information technology to support public health infrastructure and surveillance capabilities. Should you have any questions about JPHIT's feedback, please do not hesitate to contact us; inquiries can be directed to jphit@astho.org.
